headline: AI will help young workers 'mature' faster by automating grunt work, Thoma Bravo says, amid youth job crisis
summary: "If you look at our associates, they're spending a lot less time doing models or comparables than before," Orlando Bravo, founder of Thoma Bravo, told CNBC.
